settings.title: Settings
settings.readOnly: Read only, no write or command execution
settings.name: Name
settings.apiKeyHint: Used for authentication, not stored in plaintext on frontend
settings.baseUrlHint: Anthropic-compatible API address, leave empty for default
settings.tierModelHint: If the provider natively offers different model tiers, configure here
settings.mainTierHint: Determines which tier model is written to the model field
settings.permHint: Control Claude tool permissions: Ask confirms each action; Allow executes directly; Readonly blocks modifications
settings.reasoningEffortHint: Controls the model's reasoning effort preference
settings.jsonFormatError: JSON format error, please check and retry
settings.authJsonSyntaxError: auth.json format error, please check JSON syntax
settings.configPreview: Current config file content shown here…
settings.baseUrlHintExtended: Anthropic-compatible API URL. Do not add /v1 suffix. Leave blank for official default.
settings.compactThresholdHint: Token threshold: triggers auto-compact when context exceeds this value. Leave blank for SDK default.
settings.networkAccessHint: Allow network access by default in new sessions
settings.permissionHint: Controls tool permissions: file writes, command execution, and other sensitive operations.
settings.skipVerifyHint: Skip domain security verification (recommended for domestic networks)
settings.tierModelHintExtended: Only fill in if the provider uses different model names for each tier.
settings.apiKeyHintExtended: Used for authentication. Supports Anthropic official keys, third-party proxy keys, or self-built keys.
settings.apiKeyHintOpenAI: Used for authentication. Supports OpenAI official keys, third-party proxy keys, or self-built keys.
settings.configPreviewHint: This shows the current config file content. Model-related sections are managed by the form above; other sections are preserved.
settings.installFailedManual: Install failed, please run manually: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
settings.newVersionMsg:
New Claude Code version v{latest} found, current version v{local}

Update now?
settings.webFetchDisabled: Disabled: WebFetch will perform domain security verification
settings.invalidThresholdRange: Please enter a valid token threshold ({min} ~ {max})
settings.importFailedNoConn: Import failed: Unable to connect to main process
settings.importNoDataDir: MindCraft user data directory not found. Please ensure mindcraft-electron is installed and has run at least once
settings.importOverwriteMsg:
Overwrite "{name}" with config file?

Will read current runtime config from ~/.claude/settings.json,
overwriting this record's name, key, URL, model, etc.

This action cannot be undone. Continue?
settings.importNoSettingsJson: settings.json not found or is empty
settings.importNoApiKey: No API Key or Base URL found in config file
settings.codexInstallSuccessRefresh: Codex installed successfully, click ↻ to refresh version
settings.codexNewVersionMsg:
New Codex version v{latest} found, current version v{local}

Update now?
settings.codexUpdateCompleteRefresh: Codex update complete, click ↻ to refresh version
settings.permissionPolicySet: Permission policy set to "{label}", effective for new sessions only
settings.importNoConfigCodex: No config found to import (shared files are already interoperable)
settings.codexImportOverwriteMsg:
Overwrite "{name}" with config file?

Will read current runtime config from ~/.codex/config.toml,
overwriting this record's name, Key, URL, model, etc.

This action cannot be undone. Continue?
settings.importNoConfigToml: config.toml not found or is empty
settings.importNoAuthToken: No experimental_bearer_token, auth_token, or base_url found in config file
settings.importConfigHint: Import provider configuration from local CLI or CC Switch
settings.importLocalCliConfigDesc: Read provider info from the current CLI config file
settings.importCcSwitchConfigDesc: Import from a CC Switch exported .sql file
settings.overwriteFromLocalConfigHint: Overwrite this config from the local CLI config file
settings.importLocalClaudeConfig: Import Local Claude Code CLI Config
settings.importLocalConfigConfirm: Import provider info from the local CLI config file. Continue?
settings.importUseCcSwitchActive: Use CC Switch active providers after import
settings.importUseCcSwitchActiveHint: Apply CC Switch active providers for CodeX and Claude Code separately
settings.importCcSwitchDesc: CC Switch .sql exports may contain both CodeX and Claude Code providers. They are auto-split by type during import. Conflicts are skipped by default and current active providers are preserved.
settings.importSuccessSummary: Import complete: CodeX {codex}, Claude Code {claude}, skipped {skipped}
settings.company: Shenzhen Hanxiang Information Technology Co., Ltd.
settings.forceUpdateRequired: Mandatory update. The app will exit.

sandbox.fullAccessDesc: Read and write any file on disk

settings.codexRepairConfigHint: Back up and repair old env_key entries in ~/.codex/config.toml without touching auth.json
settings.codexRepairConfigMsg:
This will repair old env_key entries in ~/.codex/config.toml and create a backup before writing.

Only config.toml is modified; auth.json is not touched. Continue?
settings.codexRepairNoKey: The current provider has no API key to write, so Codex CLI config cannot be repaired
settings.codexRepairNoChange: Codex CLI config does not need repair
settings.codexRepairFailed: Failed to repair Codex CLI config:
settings.claudeRepairConfigHint: Back up and repair ~/.claude/settings.json from the current provider while preserving MCP/plugins/custom settings
settings.claudeRepairConfigMsg:
This will repair ~/.claude/settings.json from the currently enabled provider and create a backup before writing.

It writes API key, Base URL, tier models, and WebFetch preflight settings, and removes old MindCraft-owned fields. MCP, plugins, and unknown custom settings are preserved. Continue?
settings.claudeRepairNoKey: The current provider has no API key to write, so ClaudeCode config cannot be repaired
settings.claudeRepairNoChange: ClaudeCode config does not need repair

chat.placeholder: Ask a question, Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line, paste images directly

chat.welcomeSearch: With web search enabled, I can look up the latest information for you

error.loginExpired: Login expired, please log in again

error.roomSwitched: Room switch detected, previous room Q&A cancelled

agent.claudeDesc: Anthropic coding agent with code writing, debugging and refactoring support
agent.codexDesc: OpenAI coding agent with multi-language code generation and debugging
agent.proxyHint: The local agent proxy will automatically perform Responses ↔ Chat protocol translation for this provider
agent.selectFirst: Select a working directory first, then create or select a session
agent.selectOrNew: Create a new session or select from sidebar
agent.selectOrNewChat: Create a new session or select from sidebar…
agent.queueMsg: Queued next message… (will send after current reply)
agent.queueSend: Queue this message (sent after current reply)
agent.sendMsgClaude: Message Claude… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
agent.safeModeHint: This session contains extremely long tool output at the end. Auto-restore of history has been deferred to prevent freezing when entering the agent.
agent.sessionInstructionHint: The session description is for identification and future agent routing only; it is not injected. Enabled session instructions are injected starting with the next message.
agent.sessionDescriptionPlaceholder: What this session is suited for
agent.sessionInstructionPlaceholder: Write the project background, customer configuration, role, constraints, checklist, or notes this session should follow.
agent.sessionInstructionAttachmentHint: Referenced text files — latest content is read and injected before sending. Supports .md / .txt / .json / .yaml / .yml / .toml, per file ≤ 256KB
agent.sendMsgCodex: Message Codex… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
agent.restoringSessionHint: Reading project and title metadata only, not scanning full messages. Please wait.
agent.connectingDesc: Loading Agent / SDK and connecting to model, may take a few dozen seconds…
agent.executingDesc: Model or tool processing, please wait if slow…
agent.contextHint: Auto-compact at ~80%, click to compact now.
agent.autoCompactHint: CodeX manages context automatically based on the compact threshold.
agent.startChatHint: Type a command below to start
agent.marketplaceSetupHint: Run claude plugin add-marketplace... in terminal to add sources
agent.author: Author
agent.safetyHint: This session contains very long tool output at the end, switched to safety mode to maintain performance.
agent.restoringHint: Loading project and title metadata only, not restoring full conversation history to save resources.
agent.selectFolderLock: Select and lock a working folder first
agent.extraDirsHint: Not set. Add to access across folders without elevating sandbox level
agent.claudeSlow: Claude is responding slowly (loading context or waiting for network), please wait…
agent.codexSlow: Codex is responding slowly, please wait…
agent.codexAutoCompactDesc: CodeX manages context based on auto-compact threshold.
agent.compactHint: Auto-compacts at ~80% usage. Click to compact now.
agent.switchedApi: API config switched. Current conversation will continue using the new model.
agent.renameFirst: Please send a message first, then rename after the session file is created
agent.closeProjectTab:
Close this project tab?
This project has running conversations. Closing will interrupt them.
agent.planModeActivated: Switched to Plan Mode. In Plan Mode, Codex will output a plan before executing. Enter /plan again to exit.
agent.codexBusy: CodeX is processing the previous request, please try again later
agent.deferredHistoryHint: File {size} KB, {count} overly long outputs at tail, longest {maxLen} KB.
agent.marketConnectFailed: Unable to connect to skills.sh, check your network

memory.noMemories: No memories. Use /memory add <type> <name> <content> to add one
memory.addUsage:
Usage: /memory add [--system] <type> <name> <content>
type: user|feedback|project|reference
Example: /memory add user my_role "role description"
memory.needContent:
Please provide memory content. Usage:
/memory add {type} {name} <content>
memory.deleteFailed: Delete failed: file not found or already deleted
memory.helpText:
Available commands:
/memory — View all memories (system + project)
/memory add [--system] <type> <name> <content>
/memory show [--system] <filename>
/memory delete [--system] <filename>
/memory inject <system|user|off>

Add --system for system-level memory (~/.claude/memory/)

system.claudeSlow: Claude is responding slowly (loading context or waiting for network), please wait…
system.codexSlow: Codex is responding slowly, please wait…
system.codexTimeout: Codex execution timed out (10 min no response), automatically aborted. Please retry.
system.permissionDenied: User denied this tool permission request
system.readonlyRejected: Current permission policy is read-only. Write or execute tools are denied.
system.maxSteps: This turn reached max execution steps and was ended. Send a new message to continue (context preserved).
system.noCodex: Codex not detected. Run: npm install -g @openai/codex
system.noApiKey: API Key or Base URL not configured
system.codexEnded: Codex session ended abnormally: no completion event received. Please retry.
system.installPerm: Permission denied. Run terminal as administrator or use cmd right-click "Run as administrator"
system.installNoNpm: npm not detected. Please install Node.js first (https://nodejs.org)
system.installNetErr: Network connection failed. Check network or set npm proxy (npm config set proxy)
system.installDisk: Insufficient disk space, clean up and retry
system.installLocked: File is locked. Close other programs using Claude and retry
system.skillNoSource: This skill has no installation source
system.installFail: Installation failed, check network connection and retry
system.invalidThreshold: Please enter a valid token threshold
